headline: Is General Dynamics (GD) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Consolidation?
summary: Wondering if General Dynamics at US$350.53 is still offering value or if most of the opportunity is already priced in? This article breaks down what the current market price might be implying. The stock has been relatively steady in the short term, with a 0.6% decline over 7 days and a 3.9% decline over 30 days, while still sitting on a 2.1% year to date gain. Over longer periods, returns of 29.4% over 1 year, 62.9% over 3 years and 111.5% over 5 years frame the current level in a wider...
